_publications._publicationTitle: Gene signature associated with benign neurofibroma transformation to malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: genes grouped independently, and dendrograms were determined of the comparisons and of the genes, grouped in 46 clusters represented by their self-organizing tree algorithm (SOTA) centroid vectors
details: Successfully clustered 2209 NF1-related genes into 46 clusters represented by centroid vectors, identifying four biomarker panels with most populated clusters containing >15 genes
